componentDescription: Renders visually appealing background gradients with customizable colors, directions, and animations.

type.description: Specifies the type of gradient to be rendered, such as linear or radial.

direction.description: Defines the direction for a linear gradient, e.g., 'to top', 'to right'.

shape.description: Determines the shape of a radial gradient, such as 'circle' or 'ellipse'.

position.description: Sets the starting position for a radial gradient, e.g., 'center', 'farthest-corner'.

from.description: Specifies the starting color of the gradient, usually in hexadecimal or RGB format. Used if 'colors' array is not provided.

to.description: Specifies the ending color of the gradient, usually in hexadecimal or RGB format. Used if 'colors' array is not provided.

colors.description: Defines an array of color stops to create a multi-color gradient, providing more granular control over color transitions.

animate.description: Controls whether the gradient should animate its colors or position over time.

animationDuration.description: Sets the duration of the gradient animation in milliseconds.

children.description: Allows rendering of child components or elements within the gradient container.

views.description: Provides custom styles for different parts of the gradient component, allowing for theme integration or specific visual adjustments.
